Job description

You will be collaborating with different Stakeholders and developing a deep understanding of the business and its operational processes. Proven work experience or bachelor’s degree (preferably Economics or MINT). Strong analytical skills and the ability to communicate figures in an understandable and inspiring way. Interest in understanding the business and its main drivers.
